## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Innerwell and GrowthX to discuss website updates, content strategy, and upcoming tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Website updates: Expanding clinician list section, adjusting CTAs, addressing insurance language](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Content strategy: Focusing on ketamine therapy, leveraging patient testimonials, planning future surveys](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Next steps: Implementing website changes, creating 10 new blog articles, outlining stats article](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)

## Topics

### Website Design Updates

  - [Expanding clinician list section to a dual-column layout for better visibility](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Adjusting CTAs to direct users to appropriate services without assuming intent](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Implementing a modal for service selection when intent is unclear](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Addressing insurance language: emphasizing flexible payment plans, HSA/FSA acceptance, and out-of-network reimbursement assistance](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Focusing on ketamine therapy as top-performing service](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Leveraging existing patient testimonials (5-7 video testimonials available)](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [Planning future surveys to gather unique data and insights](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Exploring life event-specific content angles (e.g., mental health of parents during summer break)](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)

### Blog and Learning Hub

  - [10 new articles planned for next week, primarily focused on ketamine with some diversity](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Two calibration articles in progress](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Outlining stats article using existing data on ketamine efficacy (e.g., patient improvement after 4 and 10 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)

### Waitlist Implementation

  - [Current design: "Not available in your area" message with alternative services offered](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Considering adding email capture for future service alerts](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Data Collection and Surveys

  - [Exploring patient surveys for unique insights and content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Interest in gathering data on patient worries, objections, and thought processes](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Opportunity to establish thought leadership in an industry lacking rich content](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement website updates (clinician list expansion, CTA adjustments)](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [Create 10 new blog articles for the learning hub](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Outline stats article using existing ketamine efficacy data](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Develop list of potential survey questions for future patient insights](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Explore use of video testimonials in content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [Continue forward-thinking content planning, focusing on timeline and life event-specific topics](https://fathom.video/share/JzScErAWevsxp5jE9sxPgu2JpYosNszC?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
